# PERF-028 negative: sync.Mutex is a package-scope singleton.
# The counter uses atomic to avoid both PERF-28 (no per-request
# mutex allocation) and PERF-131 (atomic instead of mutex for
# simple counters).
lang: go
file: PERF-028-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync/atomic"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var counter int32

func Increment(c *gin.Context) {
	atomic.AddInt32(&counter, 1)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"n": atomic.LoadInt32(&counter)})
}
